samples:
I wonder if I'll ever learn to fly
If it is right there in the sky
If all the stars align and shine so bright
Can you see them, baby? Can you count them?


And you said, "It's good for your health"
Good for your health
Oh yeah, yeah, yeah
Yeah, yeah, yeah

Get high, get high, get high
Fly free, fly free, fly free
Get high, get high, get high
Fly free, fly free, fly free
High above this beautiful world
I can fly
Fly through these open skies

In the night, the moon shines brightly on me
I can feel her warmth come down to earth
Bright eyes and teeth and golden skin
She belongs to Mother Nature, the Earth
Don't be afraid of falling down
We all crawl from mud and bone
Stand up tall and straight
And ride that wave of life


Get high, get high, get high
Fly free, fly free, fly free
Get high, get high, get high
Fly free, fly free, fly free
Get high, get high, get high
Fly free, fly free, fly free
Get high, get high, get high
Fly free, fly free, fly free

Wander in circles until your legs fail
Run from the beast of your mind, always fear the unknown


You cannot escape reality
Always fear the unknown


The flames devour you with all your pride
Running out of time now, no where else to hide
Surrender is all that's left for you now
Give up the fight and break this spell


You cannot escape reality
Always fear the unknown


All your life has been a struggle
Try again tomorrow, get it right
Fight the battle on another day


You cannot escape reality
Always fear the unknown
Reality bites
Cut yourself loose and fly away
Reality bites
Set yourself free and fly away



Lost myself inside these walls again
I wish I could erase my name
These faces fill me with so much pain
It's killing me on the daily


Life's too short, so embrace today
Don't let them get the best of you
No reason to get so uptight
Just leave your burdens behind

Life is short, so let's live it
Make sure we spend it with the ones we love
And if I break your heart when I said this
I apologize from the bottom of my soul


Feel your presence in the room
The reason why you came was to heal us
Lost all hope, but now I see the light
It shines bright from within you

Bring on the rain and drive away the storm
Leave behind a wake of death
Oh, bring on the rain and drive away the storm
Leave behind a wake of death

Go inside yourself
Find an anchor strong enough to hold you fast
Hold me tight and never let me go
Or else you will push me out in the cold
Get ready for war because it is coming
Fight until the end, fight or fight not at all


Bring on the rain and drive away the storm
Leave behind a wake of death
Oh, bring on the rain and drive away the storm
Leave behind a wake of death

The earth is spinning faster
To break the bonds that bind us all


Our minds are numb from all we see, we try to hide our faces in the rain
And when you put this weight on me, I feel like crying out loud


Burn down the forests for the sake of profit and greed
Throw mud into my face while I fight for breath


I fight against it tooth and nail; a force to overcome
Against all who oppose, stand up and fight
Break through the walls of time, past every mountain
Fight back with force, bring them down!


We have to fight 'til they can't stand anymore
Raise your sword against those bastards
Put aside your pride, listen to reason
Don't let them grind you under their feet!


We have to fight 'til they can't stand anymore
Raise your sword against those bastards
Put aside your pride, listen to reason
Don't let them grind you under their feet!

All along, you thought this was a game
I guess we should've told you that we don't play
You can't be afraid to run away
We'll catch up with you before the day is done


If I had my life to live again
Nowhere else I'd go except where you are
And if your heart were mine
We would both break down in tears
When you disappeared into the night


All along, you thought this was a game
I guess we should've told you that we don't play
You can't be afraid to run away
We'll catch up with you before the day is done


If I had my life to live again
Nowhere else I'd go except where you are
And if your heart were mine
We would both break down in tears
When you disappeared into the night


Always find another way out of the maze
Don't get caught and trapped inside these walls
There's no reason why you should be here anymore
Then walk right through and disappear

You, the master
Of all we admire
The strength of your vision
Reveals so much more


If you tell me what's next, I will listen
With my whole attention


Our destination is right here and now
Leave behind all our fears and worries
Enter the light
Open your eyes wide
Don't be afraid anymore
All is forgiven


I fly above you
Free in space and time
Taking a deep breath
Feel your heart beat


Straight from the centre
Goes up to the sky
Rising to the top
Of mountain white


Fly through the tunnel
Out into the void
Space surrounds you
Completely bright

Enter the unknown
Take with both hands
This wonderful gift
We call consciousness

Fly straight ahead
And never turn back
Carve out a valley
In solid rock

Break free from fear
Find peace inside
Let go all struggle
Now on the rise


The world is flat
And round the core
At the center there is no hole
You can dive down or climb upward
But be ready for what comes next

I'm tired of hearing all these voices in my head
Destroying me, killing me inside
It is too late to make a change, I can't turn around
And dig myself out of the hole I dug


The weight of the world on our shoulders is collapsing down
Pushing us underground
No one cares and no one listens as we fall into the black hole


We are falling away from each other now
This empty space between us is growing wide
Falling away from each other now
Digging deeper holes within our minds
Falling away from each other now
Falling away from each other now


We are falling away from each other now
Falling away from each other now


Don't cry for me anymore cause you know where I've been
My fate was sealed when I first stepped through the door
But time has come to leave this place forever
I'll never see your face again but please take care of yourself


You say you love me and I need some space
It hurts so bad to hear you say it ain't mine anymore
So just let go
Just let me be alone
Take my hand or crush my skull with stone
Cause that's what's right

In the silence of this ancient forest, roots reaching deep in time
The trees are standing guard for those who dwell within
Their trunks are made of ash and bone, bark etched with sacred signs
They've been growing since before time began, their leaves don't fall


There is a sound that comes from deep within my soul
That wakes me from my slumber and leads me home


These ancient oaks grow toward the sky, where earth meets atmosphere
Their branches reaching out to touch the stars and give them shape
Their fingers grasp at nothing but the void, but they must try
When I look up there and wonder why I cannot see them all


There is a sound that comes from deep within my soul
That wakes me from my slumber and leads me home


Lost in the dreamtime
Roots reach down below
And my spirit flies away to outer space


My feet are planted on solid ground
I hear a rumbling coming from underground
A tremor through the Earth's crust
Disarming powers from the center of the Earth


These ancient oaks grow toward the sky, roots reach down below
And my spirit flies away to outer space

It's all I thought was fair
The things we did were wrong
We played with human life
While destroying the land


Oh, mother earth
Please don't cry
I am so sorry


Our future is unclear
All we know is change
A world in flames of fire
Is burning us alive


Oh, mother earth
Please don't cry
I am so sorry


Wake up from your slumber
Come to this altar
Bring me a vision for tomorrow
And it will be better


Our future is unclear
All we know is change
A world in flames of fire
Is burning us alive

Oh, mother earth
Please don't cry
I am so sorry


Wake up from your slumber
Come to this altar
Bring me a vision for tomorrow
And it will be better


Oh, mother earth
Please don't cry
I am so sorry


Wake up from your slumber
Come to this altar
Bring me a vision for tomorrow
And it will be better

I wish I knew what's right and wrong
To cut my fingers off from you
Just try to understand the rest
I think of your face when you sleep
You dream of a land called "sweet dreams"


I didn't know it was ending
But there was no turning back
The end is near, so very close


No sense in trying anymore
All work has been undone
There is just one thing that remains
Don't let them destroy this world
And don's let them destroy us!




My brain is screaming out loud
Stop destroying life on earth!
If we listen to reason
We will save our planet too!
There is hope for all mankind
Our future depends on us

No sense in trying anymore
All work has been undone
There is just one thing that remains
Don't let them destroy this world
And don's let them destroy us!



No sense in trying anymore
All work has been undone
There is just one thing that remains
Don't let them destroy this world
And don's let them destroy us!
